message:
feat(random,io,ufunc): add RNG state serialization, fix ziggurat sampling, and harden .npy parsing

RNG state serialization (fnp-random — 215 lines):
- Add to_state_entries() / from_state_entries() for all four BitGenerator
  backends (Pcg64Dxsm, Philox, Sfc64, Mt19937) enabling checkpoint/restore
  of PRNG state across sessions
- Add SeedMaterial::None variant for default-seed construction
- Move algorithm_state_schema_value into BitGeneratorState as associated fn
- Relax state validation: skip algorithm_state check when custom state entries
  are present (real PRNG backends with restored state)

Ziggurat normal/exponential sampling fixes:
- Fix sign bit extraction in sample_ziggurat_normal: shift right 8 then extract
  sign from bit 0 and abs from bits 1..53, matching NumPy's bit layout
- Fix tail branch sign selection for consistency
- Fix sample_ziggurat_exponential: shift right 3 bits before extracting index
  byte (matching NumPy's 3-bit discard)

Generator state hygiene:
- Clear u32_buf_ready flag in next_u64() and next_f64() to prevent stale
  cached u32 values from being returned after manual state advancement

.npy file parsing (fnp-io):
- Replace .unwrap() calls on header dictionary lookups with proper .ok_or()
  error propagation returning IOError::HeaderSchemaInvalid

ufunc:
- Use let-chain syntax for cleaner nested Option matching in take() sidecar
- Replace indexed loop with iter_mut().enumerate() in matmul

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
